articles.title: Water safety warning after nine people die during heatwave
articles.description: Charities urge people to take precautions after at least nine people died after getting into difficulty in water during the warm weather.

articles.title: Energy bills to rise for millions as impact of Iran war hits
articles.description: A household using a typical amount of energy will pay £221 a year more, under the regulator's new price cap.

articles.title: Resident doctors to strike for 16th time over pay
articles.description: British Medical Association resident doctor members in England announce new strike for four days from 15 June.

articles.title: Five people found alive after week trapped in flooded Laos cave
articles.description: The search is continuing for a further two villagers who are still missing, rescuers say.
